summary: Uno Platform ReactiveUI integration with startup-window-aware initialization and WASM-specific scheduler considerations.
recommendedPatterns: Use the Uno-specific ReactiveUI builder integration and pass the startup window where required.
Keep platform-specific initialization separate from generic desktop assumptions.
avoidPatterns: Do not ignore Uno startup window requirements.
Do not assume desktop thread pool behavior in WASM builds.
setupSteps: Initialize ReactiveUI through the Uno builder extension.
Validate behavior on both native and WASM targets.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
